Ravindra Jadeja Took Pay Cut to Join RR – Stunning IPL Move

Nov 15, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Ravindra Jadeja Took Pay Cut to Join RR – Stunning IPL Move

In one of the most unexpected IPL trade stories, Ravindra Jadeja has been reported to accept a pay cut to join the Rajasthan Royals (RR) — underlining his desire for a new chapter and the franchise’s commitment to his value.
